title: Methods for improving nanocellulose dispersion in elastomeric compounds, and compositions containing dispersed nanocellulose in elastomer compounds
abstract: Nanocellulose dispersion compositions containing a partitioning agent and a nanocellulose, and methods of making the nanocellulose dispersion compositions, are disclosed. These compositions can promote improved dispersibility of the nanocellulose fibrils and nanocellulose crystals in polymer matrices, such as in elastomer formulations for use in tire production.
claims: 1. A polymer composition comprising: (I) a polymer; (II) a nanocellulose dispersion composition (NDC) comprising: (i) a partitioning agent comprising a carbon black filler and at least one of an elastomer latex and/or a wax; and (ii) a nanocellulose; and (III) a carbon black additive.
